summary: P1 Congés/Absences — 10/10 backend tests passed, all 18 frontend features verified. Fixed 1 bug in leaves/service.py (holiday_days always 0 in month stats).
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Bug in /app/backend/modules/leaves/service.py — get_month_calendar passed working_dates (holidays already excluded) to count_working_days, causing holiday_days to always return 0. Fixed by passing all non-weekend dates instead.
seed_data_creation: Test leave entries created/deleted during tests (DATE_WD=2026-02-10 cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Congés fully working. Backend: /api/holidays, /api/leaves/entry (CRUD), /api/leaves/month, /api/timesheets/grid (with leaves/holidays/day_caps). Frontend: Absences tab with monthly calendar, resource picker, holiday flags (🇫🇷/🇲🇦), stats panel, day cycling (0→½j→1j→0), absence-row in Ma saisie grid. Bug fixed: holiday_days=0 in month stats.
rca_of_the_issue: In get_month_calendar (leaves/service.py), working_dates was computed as [dates where not weekend AND not holiday], then passed to count_working_days(). But count_working_days() counts holidays by checking _HOLIDAY_INDEX — since holidays were already excluded from the list, holiday_days was always 0. Fix: pass all non-weekend dates to count_working_days so it can detect and count holidays itself.
